The '''9118 heavy carbine''' was a heavy [[Blaster carbine/Legends|carbine]] design manufactured by the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]]-owned [[N'Gant-Zarvel]] corporation. Sporting a short barrel, the weapon was known for its ease of use, stopping power and exceptional range for a carbine.<ref name="RoE" /> This weapon cost 1000 credits.<ref name="RoE" /> This carbine saw its primary use in the field as the preferred service weapon of [[Special forces/Legends|special forces]] and guerrilla fighters, despite the loud, "thumping" sound it produced when it was fired. Sometime following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], [[Staff Sergeant/Legends|Staff Sergeant]] [[Rothax]], based out of the [[Talus/Legends|Talus]] [[Talus Imperial Outpost|Imperial Outpost]], sold this carbine to [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] who served valiantly in the battlefield.

==Behind the scenes==
The images in the ''[[Arms & Equipment Guide]]'' and [https://web.archive.org/web/20020925223739/http://www.wizards.com/default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20020919arms Blasters and Rifles on Wizards.com] are incorrectly labeled as as a N'gant-Zarvel 9118 when they are actually presenting an image of an [[EE-3 carbine rifle/Legends|EE-3 carbine rifle]]. The canonical image of the 9118 is presented above.

In the [[2003]] [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', this weapon could be purchased by players using tokens obtained from Player versus Player battlefields.
